title: 50 x Silver Foil Food Trays/Dishes/Containers & Lids - 120 x 145 x 49 mm (No.2)
features: Size: Width x Length x Height (All measurements are approximate and may vary slightly).
Disposable serving bowls, so no washing up necessary!
Image is for illustration purposes only. Please see the product size for details.
description: These high quality bowls are made of food grade aluminium foil. They are of excellent quality and stackable so they do not take up much space. Disposable serving bowls, so no annoying washing up necessary. These bowls are suitable for use in ovens and freezers (note - the lids are not suitable for use in ovens).

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Disposable, do not reuse or wash. Suitable for ovens and freezers (except lids).
